content: I need to write a cover letter for multiple job recruitment agencies, in the e-mail i'm  going to attach my resume, i'm applying for junior bartender/barbacks jobs with 2 years of experience at a local bar here in Córdoba Argentina, i'm from Argentina and i'm 21 years old, i'm fluent in english. Also the jobs that im applying to are in the middle east so keep that in mind

moves.text_span: I need to write a cover letter for multiple job r

content:
Dear [Recruitment Agency],

I am writing to express my interest in the Junior Bartender/Barback position that you have advertised on your website, as I believe my experience and passion for bartending would make me an ideal candidate for the role. 

As you can see from my attached resume, I have 2 years of experience working as a bartender and barback at a local bar in Córdoba, Argentina. I am skilled in mixing cocktails, pouring beer, managing inventory, and providing exceptional customer service. 

My passion for bartending started at a young age, and I have always been fascinated by the way in which different ingredients can be combined to create unique and flavorful drinks. I am also highly organized and detail-oriented, which ensures that all tasks are performed to the highest standard.

Furthermore, I am fluent in English, making me an excellent candidate for any positions available in the Middle East. I am excited about the opportunity to work with people from different cultures and to continue developing my skills in a new environment.

Thank you for considering my application. Please do not hesitate to contact me if you require any further information.

Best regards,

[Your name]

content: how can i name multiple agencies at the same time without them noticing that i'm emailing to a lot of them?

You can use a general salutation in your email such as "Dear Recruitment Team" or "Dear Hiring Manager." Another option is to not mention the agency's name at all and use a more general introduction such as "To Whom It May Concern." This way, they will not know that you are emailing multiple agencies at the same time.
